definition: set of elements which interact according to a design, where an element of a system can be another system, called a subsystem, which may be a controlling system or a controlled system and may include hardware, software and human interaction

definition_ml.en: set of elements which interact according to a design, where an element of a system can be another system, called a subsystem, which may be a controlling system or a controlled system and may include hardware, software and human interaction
definition_ml.fr: ensemble d'éléments qui interagissent selon une conception, un élément d'un système pouvant être un autre système, appelé sous-système, qui peut être un système de commande ou un système commandé et peut comprendre des composants matériels et logiciels et des interactions humaines
definition_ml.de: Satz an Elementen, die entsprechend einer Auslegung interagieren, wobei ein Element eines Systems ein anderes System, genannt Teilsystem, sein kann, das ein Steuerungssystem oder ein gesteuertes System sein und ein Zusammenspiel aus Hardware, Software und Personen beinhalten kann

raw_properties.MDC_P006.en: set of elements which interact according to a design, where an element of a system can be another system, called a subsystem, which may be a controlling system or a controlled system and may include hardware, software and human interaction
